nasb.text: Ben-geber, in Ramoth-gilead (the towns of Jair, the son of Manasseh, which are in Gilead were his: the region of Argob, which is in Bashan, sixty great cities with walls and bronze bars were his);

esv.text: Ben-geber, in Ramoth-gilead (he had the villages of Jair the son of Manasseh, which are in Gilead, and he had the region of Argob, which is in Bashan, sixty great cities with walls and bronze bars);

cnv.text: 便．基列在基列的拉末；瑪拿西的子孫睚珥在基列的村落是屬他的，巴珊的亞珥歌伯地的六十座有城牆和銅閂的大城也是屬他的。

ccb.text: 便·基别，负责基列的拉末和玛拿西子孙雅珥在基列的城邑，以及巴珊的亚珥歌伯地区有城墙和铜闩的大城六十座；
